title: SpongeBob's Spatula Sword
description: This resourcepack adds the SpongeBob's Spatula model when renaming any sword with anvil.
body:
# SpongeBob's Spatula

A simple resourcepack that adds the Spongebob's Spatula model when renaming any sword to "SpongeBob's Spatula" with anvil.


![Renaming in game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e8fcf7811312fc9626c8a8a5a24dd2713361434c.png)
